title: vskill / Skill Studio — Anthropic hackathon demo video (Remotion)
description: Sleek 2:30 demo video for Skill Studio, replacing the 4:46 raw screen-recording. No Anton on camera — professional ElevenLabs voiceover, Remotion-built scenes mirroring the real product UI, focused on the two killer flows: AUTHORING (create skill, AI-generate SKILL.md, evals, publish) and CONSUMING (install, surface bug, fix in author side, sync update across machines). Extends the existing vskill-platform Remotion design system.
